name: BookOrbit
short_desc: Self-hosted ebook, audiobook, and comic library with built-in readers and Kobo/KOReader sync.
description: A self-hosted library and reading platform for ebooks, audiobooks, and comics. Built-in web readers for EPUB, MOBI, AZW3, PDF, CBZ, CBR, and audiobooks (M4B, MP3). Three-way reading sync between Kobo, KOReader, and the web reader. Rich metadata from 9 providers (Google Books, Amazon, Goodreads, Open Library, Audible, ComicVine, and more), multi-user with OIDC/SSO, OPDS catalog, reading analytics and widgets, Send-to-Kindle, and a Book Dock for automated ingestion.
author: bookorbit

form_fields.label: Setup Bootstrap Token (use this to complete the first-run setup wizard)
